title: Agent fetches a single block by id without reading the whole page (M60 §6.3 C3)

fixture.prompt: What does block b-summary on page p1 say?

content.text: Ship Tier 3 by end of week.

dimensions.description: Did the agent call read_block (vs. read_page or scan_workspace)?
Did the agent pass the exact (pageId, blockId) without enumerating other blocks?
Final answer quotes the block text verbatim?
No write tool was invoked (read-only intent honored)?
